positive: A vibrant, minimalist geometric pattern featuring interconnected stylized constellations and glowing nebula elements, rendered in a deep sapphire blue and luminous cyan palette, contrasted against a clean cream background. The composition should be highly symmetrical and repeat cleanly, designed as a seamless, central placement print for apparel. Include crisp, defined linework, glowing lines that suggest cosmic dust, and subtle radial gradients for depth. Studio lighting, high contrast, vector art style, ultra-detailed, clean silhouette, print-ready, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifact, watermark, logo, text, noisy, dirty, low contrast, faded, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, random elements
